AI Agents

Powerful AI Agents for Sales Automation

Choose from our collection of specialized AI agents to build your perfect sales workflow

Company Finder

Search and discover companies based on specific criteria, industry verticals, company size, and geographic location

Job Finder

Find job postings based on titles, location, date posted, and workplace type

Company Enrichment

Analyze each company's industry, size, website, LinkedIn, and more to provide comprehensive insights

Company Remover

Remove companies based on industry, employee size, DND status, last contacted time and other custom criteria

Lead Finder

Search for qualified leads based on your specific criteria and requirements

AI Lead Scoring

Get intelligent scores for potential leads based on your requirements

Lead Remover

Remove leads based on job title, seniority, department, email status and other custom criteria

Email Finder

Find specific email addresses within companies based on role, department, seniority, and other attributes

Email Verifier

Verify email addresses for deliverability, accuracy, and risk assessment with both standard and advanced modes

Campaign Generator

Generate personalized outreach campaigns, email sequences, and marketing materials for your leads

Features

Feel Confident at Every Step of Outbound

Eliminate spam, burned domains, and unverified leads with Oppora's built-in safeguards

8 AI Agents

working together

Automated Workflows

Build complex sales processes with our drag-and-drop workflow builder. Set it once and let it run automatically.

120M+

verified contacts

AI-Powered Targeting

Use advanced AI to identify and target your ideal customers with precision and accuracy.

500+

prospects/month

Scale Your Outreach

Reach 500+ unique prospects every month with personalized, automated email campaigns.

1:1

personalization

Personalize Every Email

Every line is uniquely generated with AI. No spintext, no copy fatigue, no spam patterns.

50

mailbox rotation

Domain Warmup

Auto-warm new domains and rotate up to 50 inboxes so you scale outreach safely.

24/7

autonomous replies

Auto-Reply & Book

AI answers questions, sends attachments, qualifies interest, and books meetings instantly.

"Oppora's smart signals helped us connect with the right decision-makers as soon as jobs were posted on LinkedIn, and it directly helped us close over $850,000 in salary-based deals in two months."

"We were spending close to $200 a month on Instantly + Apollo stack, and Oppora gives us the same capability and outreach volume for just $34. Huge value for money."

Ganesh Lakhani

Operations Manager | SoftStandard Solutions

5.0
"The AI reply agent works really well. It understands responses, sends product decks in the same thread from our inbox, and books meetings automatically. This alone has reduced a lot of manual follow-up."

Solutions Specialist | Petabytz Technologies Inc
